div1.entryFree:
Button, subst., 1) a catch to fasten the dress: a silk b. Rom. II, 4, 24. undo this b. Lr. V, 3, 309. he will carry 't; 'tis in his --s, Wiv. III, 2, 71; Germ.: er hat es in der Tasche (or == bachelors' buttons?)
2) a knob on a cap: on fortune's cap we are not the very b. Hml. II, 2, 233..
3) bud: the canker galls the infants of the spring too oft before their --s be disclosed, Hml. I, 3, 40.
